name: Echo Sabre
description: A deceptively swift blade imbued with resonant magic.

abilities.name: Echo Strike
abilities.description: The next attack grants the wielder a buff that greatly increases attack speed for one attack. Cooldown: 5. Mana Cost: 0. Attack Speed Bonus: 490. Number of Attacks: 1. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Duration: 0.8. The triggering attack also briefly slows the enemy's movement speed. The second attack does not slow.
